scripts.env:local: cp apps/admin/.env.local.local apps/admin/.env.local && cp apps/web/.env.local.local apps/web/.env.local && echo 'Switched to local Supabase configuration'
scripts.env:cloud: cp apps/admin/.env.local.cloud apps/admin/.env.local && cp apps/web/.env.local.cloud apps/web/.env.local && echo 'Switched to cloud Supabase configuration'
